title: Occupational Therapy Assistants
description: Assist occupational therapists in providing occupational therapy treatments and procedures. May, in accordance with state laws, assist in development of treatment plans, carry out routine functions, direct activity programs, and document the progress of treatments. Generally requires formal training.

tasks.text: Instruct, or assist in instructing, patients and families in home programs, basic living skills, or the care and use of adaptive equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain and promote a positive attitude toward clients and their treatment programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Report to supervisors, verbally or in writing, on patients' progress, attitudes, and behavior.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement, or assist occupational therapists with implementing, treatment plans designed to help clients function independently.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor patients' performance in therapy activities, providing encouragement.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe and record patients' progress, attitudes, and behavior and maintain this information in client records.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select therapy activities to fit patients' needs and capabilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend continuing education classes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Aid patients in dressing and grooming themselves.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate the daily living skills or capacities of clients with physical, developmental, or mental health disabilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Communicate and collaborate with other healthcare professionals involved with the care of a patient.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Work under the direction of occupational therapists to plan, implement, or administer educational, vocational, or recreational programs that restore or enhance performance in individuals with functional impairments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Alter treatment programs to obtain better results if treatment is not having the intended effect.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assemble, clean, or maintain equipment or materials for patient use.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Transport patients to and from the occupational therapy work area.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design, fabricate, or repair assistive devices or make adaptive changes to equipment or environments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend care plan meetings to review patient progress and update care plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Demonstrate therapy techniques, such as manual or creative arts or games.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach patients how to deal constructively with their emotions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Order any needed educational or treatment supplies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform clerical duties, such as scheduling appointments, collecting data, or documenting health insurance billings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist educational specialists or clinical psychologists in administering situational or diagnostic tests to measure client's abilities or progress.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
